narrative: Senior NLP Engineer at Salesforce with nine years of experience, bringing a product‑first background. Verified skill depth was the strongest factor, pushing the ranking higher despite modest platform engagement. Demonstrated solid alignment with the role through hands‑on work with Haystack, BM25 and OpenSearch, plus deep‑learning expertise and recent use of PEFT on Elasticsearch, directly matching the search and retrieval focus. Broad technical breadth and stable career trajectory further support the fit. However, the candidate is based in Coimbatore, not the preferred Pune/Noida hub, and notice period is unclear, while minor credibility concerns temper confidence.
